meaning: adj.进贡的,附庸的,从属的,辅助的,支流的n.进贡国,附庸国,支流
examples: This is a tributary of Zhujiang River.
The principality became tributary to the Ottoman Empire during 16th century.
Mi-(mì) LUO Jiang-Xiangbei in the Xiangjiang River is the largest tributary.
The drone crashed into a tributary of the Nanticoke River, a U.S. Coast Guard official said.
The fluids reportedly overflowed a containment area and leaked into a tributary of Towanda Creek.
